rag_rules: Assume and guarantee statements must be placed in component type scopes, not implementation scopes
Binary expressions in assume/guarantee must have compatible boolean types on both sides
Assignments in implementation annexes must reference valid subcomponent paths and types
generic_rules: Fix type mismatches by ensuring expression types match expected boolean types in AGREE contracts
Move implementation-specific bindings from component type annexes to implementation annexes
Validate that all identifiers in AGREE contracts are visible within the current scope
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts use bool-type expressions for assume/guarantee conditions
Component type contracts cannot reference implementation-level subcomponent paths directly
Use only visible AADL features or declared helpers in AGREE annexes
anti_patterns: Placing assume/guarantee statements in component implementation annexes where they are not allowed
Using integer literals or arithmetic in boolean contexts without proper type conversion
